title: matelea ferruginea
intro: Matelea ferruginea, also known as the rusty vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Native to Central and South America, this plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea ferruginea include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Matelea ferruginea can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
